caption:
Looking for things to do in Florida? 👀 
This spot (plus 1,000+ more) is in my Florida Travel Guide + Interactive Map perfect for weekend getaways, road trips, and exploring without hours of research and stress! 💬 Comment “GUIDE” and I’ll send it to you!

If Crystal River isn’t on your Florida list yet, it should be. This charming coastal town is best known for its clear natural springs, manatee encounters, and laid-back Old Florida vibe. 

During manatee season (November through March) you can visit Three Sister’s Spring where you can see hundreds of manatees huddled up in the spring to stay warm in the bluest water you’ve ever seen. You can also swim with the manatees here! It’s the only place in the US where you can legally swim with them and it’s a bucket list activity! You can also kayak or paddle through crystal-clear water, walk scenic boardwalks, spot wildlife, or just slow down and enjoy the small-town feel. 

Downtown Crystal River is full of local restaurants, cozy cafés, quaint shops and galleries, and friendly locals. 

It’s one of those places that just feels peaceful, authentic, and very much old Florida — perfect for a weekend getaway or a stop on a road trip.
